retry_reason: Decrement is unconditional; after the call, the object may be freed, so retrying would be a use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that decrements the reference count of a sighand_struct and, if the count reaches zero, performs cleanup (signalfd_cleanup) and frees the memory via kmem_cache_free. The caller must not use the object after this call, as it may have been freed. The function does not indicate whether the object was freed; the caller must assume the reference is released and the object may be invalid. This is the release side of the lifecycle—each get must be paired with exactly one __cleanup_sighand.
